goal: Strengthen the M6-RC evidence verifier so review-document requirements match the expected release decision: NOT_GO verification continues to require the current blocker docs, while GO verification requires final M6 signoff and CTO GO markers. Add focused tests and keep the current local state NOT_GO because real trained adapter no-fake endpoint evidence is still absent.
head: d669dd7
blocked_scope: Changing real-adapter endpoint, intake, bundle, or v0 readiness acceptance policy
Editing M6 review signoff/CTO docs to claim GO
Pulling Docker images, running CUDA training, or downloading dependencies as part of the committed phase
Creating or committing model weights, adapters, endpoint transcripts, copied external evidence bundles, or GO release evidence
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may update only the M6-RC verifier review-doc check, add focused tests for GO/NOT_GO doc requirements, refresh current NOT_GO verifier artifacts, and update WORKING.md plus this PABCD contract.
required_evidence: M6-RC verifier expected NOT_GO mode still accepts current NOT_GO review docs when the only blocker is real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint
M6-RC verifier expected GO mode requires final M6 signoff GO and CTO Decision: GO markers
M6-RC verifier expected GO mode rejects otherwise complete endpoint evidence when M6 docs still say NOT_GO
Current local M6/v0 readiness remains NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the sole release blocker
warnings: M6-RC remains NOT_GO until real CUDA training and no-fake Docker endpoint evidence are collected.
This gate does not edit docs/reviews/M6 to GO and does not claim release readiness.

phase_notes.plan: Open a scoped verifier-hardening gate for M6 review-doc requirements by expected decision.
phase_notes.audit: Inspect current M6/v0 verifier behavior and confirm the gap: M6 verifier review-doc check is hardcoded to current NOT_GO docs even when expected GO is requested.
phase_notes.build: Updated verify_m6_rc_evidence.py so review-doc requirements are decision-aware and added focused tests for NOT_GO docs, stale NOT_GO docs under expected GO, and final GO docs.
phase_notes.check: Focused tests passed, current M6 verifier and v0 readiness remained expected NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the only release blocker, and M1 smoke bootstrap passed in .venv.
phase_notes.done: Phase verified. Stage, commit, and push are approved by the user phase policy; release readiness remains NOT_GO until real trained adapter no-fake endpoint evidence exists.

pabcd.approved_scope: M6-RC verifier review-doc decision requirements, focused tests, refreshed NOT_GO verifier artifacts, WORKING.md, and PABCD contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product runtime/API/UI/DB/schema/training changes, no endpoint/bundle/v0 acceptance weakening, no M6 review doc GO edit, no Docker/CUDA execution, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
